loop1.title: PQ Issues KPI Strip (Total Issues / I-THD Events / V-THD Events / PF Gap Feeders / Neutral Stress / Worst I-THD / Worst V-THD)
loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate event counts and worst-case feeders; harmonic magnitudes (h3/h5/h7) and peak THD are not measured on this panel's aggregate meter.

loop1.title: Harmonics & PQ Timeline
loop1.note: Showing per-panel THD and power metrics from outgoing feeders; some feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06, Solar Incomers) have no live data and are blanked.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Showing AI narrative summary — per-member harmonic stats (h3, h5, h7, iThd, vThd) are not directly measured by this panel's aggregate table and are consumed from sibling member cards.

loop1.title: Feeder PQ At {period}
loop1.note: Showing THD and power metrics for 6 active outgoing feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark (no data) and honest-blanked.

loop1.title: Signature
loop1.note: Showing harmonic distribution (H5, H7, I-THD, V-THD) and power metrics for the 8 primary outgoing feeders; 3rd harmonic, K-factor, and peak-THD columns are not measured by these member meters and are omitted.
